name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 Spring/Summer New Arrival Small Andiamo Chain Bag! 🔥 The metallic chain adds a touch of refinement to the soft elegance of the Andiamo. A collision of classic craftsmanship and a dignified style creates a unique beauty.
name_cn:
BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 Spring/Summer New Arrival Small Andiamo Chain Bag! 🔥 The metallic chain adds a touch of refinement to the soft elegance of the Andiamo. A collision of classic craftsmanship and a dignified style creates a unique beauty.
Model: 786009
Size: 32*24*12cm
